name: Kaltura
description: Kaltura — enterprise video platform for education, enterprise, and media

seo.title: Kaltura — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Kaltura: Kaltura — enterprise video platform for education, enterprise, and media

when_to_use: Enterprise video platform for education and corporate training
VOD and live streaming for media and broadcaster workflows
Video CMS with granular access control for enterprise orgs
Interactive video with in-video quizzes for eLearning platforms
API-driven video management for self-hosted or cloud deployments

pros: Deep LMS and enterprise video integrations
Handles education, webinars, OTT in one platform
cons: UI/UX feels fragmented across product lines
Community edition harder to operate than claimed
API surface sprawling and legacy in places
review.verdict: Heavyweight video platform for universities and big enterprises — overkill and overpriced for most teams.
review.best_for: Universities, enterprises, and media companies wanting one vendor for all video use cases.
review.not_for: Startups or dev teams — Mux, Cloudflare Stream, or Vimeo simpler.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
